# AI Engineer Roadmap Tracker

> A free, opinionated 10-month curriculum for becoming a job-ready AI Engineer — built by Aryav Chanduka, B.Tech CSE AI/ML student at Manipal University Jaipur.

## What this site is

A structured 40-week learning roadmap covering every skill an AI Engineer needs: math foundations, deep learning with PyTorch, applied LLM engineering (RAG, fine-tuning, agents), ML system design, coding interviews, and AI specialization (computer vision, NLP). Daily tasks with hand-picked resources for each topic.

The tracker lets you sign in (free) to mark tasks complete, build a learning streak, and view analytics. The full roadmap is publicly visible without sign-in.

## The curriculum

- **Phase 1 — Math Foundations (Weeks 1–8)**: Linear algebra, calculus, probability, Python ML toolchain (NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib), classical ML (scikit-learn, regression, decision trees, SVMs, clustering).
- **Phase 2 — Deep Learning & PyTorch (Weeks 9–16)**: Neural networks from scratch, CNNs, NLP, transformers, building GPT from scratch (Karpathy's nanoGPT), fast.ai.
- **Phase 3 — Applied LLM Engineering (Weeks 17–24)**: Prompt engineering, RAG pipelines, LoRA fine-tuning, AI agents, LangChain, production LLM serving (vLLM, Triton).
- **Phase 4 — ML System Design & Interview Prep (Weeks 25–32)**: ML system design (recommendation, search, fraud detection), DSA for ML engineers, coding interview patterns, Grokking series.
- **Phase 5 — Specialization (Weeks 33–40)**: Advanced computer vision, advanced NLP, internship and MS application prep, capstone portfolio projects.

## Resources featured

Courses: Stanford CS229, CS224N, fast.ai, Andrew Ng ML Specialization (free audit), Deep Learning Specialization, Karpathy's Zero to Hero series.
Books: Deep Learning (Goodfellow), DDIA, Designing ML Systems (Huyen).
Papers: Attention Is All You Need, GPT-3, LLaMA, LoRA, RAG (Lewis et al.).

## Author

Aryav Chanduka — B.Tech CSE AI/ML, Manipal University Jaipur (Year 3).
Contact: aryavchanduka18@gmail.com
